title: Obesity follow-up in child

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting personalised goals, progress, barriers, support, and clinician-arranged review without inserting automatic lifestyle instructions.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports goals, progress, barriers, support and clinician-arranged review for child obesity follow-up; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting personalised goals, progress, barriers, support, and clinician-arranged review without inserting automatic lifestyle instructions.

exact_section.heading: Behavioural intervention recommendations — goals, progress, feedback, and follow-up

referral.text: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.
referral.rationale: Supports comorbidity, social context, goals, barriers, preferences and referral documentation for child obesity follow-up; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.11.1–1.11.14 — results, context, intervention discussion, and referral

follow_up.text: Supports avoiding diagnostic overshadowing, asking permission before weight discussion or measurements, and recording height, weight, BMI, waist or waist-to-height context and weight-related health risk.
follow_up.rationale: Supports permission-sensitive weight discussion and height, weight and BMI context for child obesity follow-up; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports avoiding diagnostic overshadowing, asking permission before weight discussion or measurements, and recording height, weight, BMI, waist or waist-to-height context and weight-related health risk.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.9.17 — permission, measurements, and adult assessment

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, height and weight dates, BMI reference, trajectory, comorbidity, family context, diet, activity, goals, investigations and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for child obesity follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
